title: Determination of Stability Constants of 2-Hydroxy-1-Naphthalidene-2'-Methyl-4'-Nitro-Aniline Complexes with Y3+, La3+, Pr3+, Nd3+, Gd3+ and Dy3+
author: M. S. MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Bombay-100 019 

  Manuscript received 2 January 1979, revised 24  January  1980, accepted 26 July 1980  

 "Potentiometric studies have been carried out on metal complexes of Y 3+ , La 3+ , Pr 3+ , Nd 3+ , Gd 3+  and Dy 3+  with 2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene-2 ' -methyl-4 ' -nitroaniline. The dissociation constants ( p K 1 + p K 2 ) of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal complexes have been determined by Bjerrum method at 25°±0.1° and at an ionic strength 0.1 M  in 75 : 25 percent (v/v) dioxan-water medium. The validity of Born's relation was examined by studying the plot of Z 2 /r vs log k values of rare earth complexes of the ligand.
